calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Appearances: Aldonia Williams (Petitioner). Terry Szucsko specially appearing for and with Bryon Thompson (Respondent).

Lucille Williams was not present. Mr. Szucsko raised the question regarding Aldonia Williams's authority to file this action and he argued that the Powers of Attorney listed two names (Aldonia Williams and Patricia Williams) to act for Lucille Williams and that they must act jointly. This action was filed by Aldonia Williams solely. The Court granted the Motion to Dismiss. Aldonia Williams has no authority to proceed. The Restraining Order is denied.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Louis Gillian CSR #12355. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy M. Mendoza.
